project_type: Full-stack AI video generation web app - Python FastAPI backend + React frontend
build_system: pip/pyproject.toml for backend, npm/vite for frontend
test_framework: pytest for backend, vitest for frontend
build_command: Backend: pip install -e . | Frontend: cd frontend && npm run build
test_command: Backend: pytest tests/ | Frontend: cd frontend && npm test
verification_instructions: 1. Install backend deps and run pytest. 2. Build frontend with npm run build. 3. Start backend server and confirm API endpoints respond. 4. Confirm end-to-end flow: topic -> script -> TTS -> video assembly.
setup_instructions: 1. pyenv local 3.11.15. 2. python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate. 3. pip install -e '.[dev]'. 4. apt-get install -y ffmpeg. 5. cd frontend && npm install && npm run build. 6. Copy .env.example to .env and fill in API keys.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to install packages, pull images, call external APIs. FFmpeg needs to be installed via apt. Python 3.11 via pyenv. Node.js 22 via nvm.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commit messages (feat:, fix:, docs:). Feature branches. Clear documentation.
key_patterns: OpenAI-compatible API gateway pattern supporting multiple LLM providers. All AI outputs are user-editable. Free APIs for media (Pexels, Pixabay, Giphy). edge-tts for free TTS. MoviePy + FFmpeg for video assembly.
directory_structure: backend/ - FastAPI application with services for each pipeline stage. frontend/ - React+Vite SPA for user interaction. Both at project root level.
